DATABASE_URL.note: Add as Reference, not as regular variable

REDIS_URL.note: Add as Reference, not as regular variable

instructions.step_1: Add all 'regular_variables' as normal environment variables (New Variable)
instructions.step_2: Add 'service_references' as References (select Reference when adding)
instructions.step_3: For DATABASE_URL: Variable Name = DATABASE_URL, Service = Postgres, Variable = DATABASE_URL
instructions.step_4: For REDIS_URL: Variable Name = REDIS_URL, Service = Redis, Variable = REDIS_URL
instructions.step_5: After adding all variables, Railway will auto-deploy
